---
title: "Usuarios de lenguas extranjeras"
author: "Jessica Espinosa"
format: html
editor: visual
---

```{r}
library("forecast")   
library("tidyverse")
library("tseries")
library("scales")
```

```{r}
head(Data)
```


```{r}
usuarios_anuales <- Data %>%
  group_by(fecha) %>%
  summarise(
    usuarios = sum(cenlex_hombres + cenlex_mujeres +
                   celex_hombres  + celex_mujeres,
                   na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(fecha)

cat("\nTotal de usuarios por año:\n")
print(data)
```

```{r}
par(mfrow = c(1, 3))
usuarios_ts <- ts(
  data      = data$usuarios,   
  frequency = 1,               
  start     = c(2020, 1)       
)

cat("\n Serie de tiempo creada \n")
print(usuarios_ts)
```

```{r}
log_usuarios_ts <- log(usuarios_ts)

cat("\nSerie con logaritmo (log_usuarios_ts):\n")
print(round(log_usuarios_ts, 3))
```

```{r}
cat("\n Dummies estacionales \n")
cat("Con frequency=1 (anual) seasonaldummy() no genera columnas.\n")
cat("Dummy manual: 0=2020-2021, 1=2023-2024\n\n")

dummy_manual <- matrix(
  c(0, 0, 0, 1, 1),          
  ncol = 1,
  dimnames = list(NULL, "recuperacion")
)

cat("x_dummies_log (dummy manual):\n")
print(data.frame(anio = 2020:2024, recuperacion = dummy_manual[,1]))

x_dummies_log <- dummy_manual   

```

```{r}
#Diferenciacion logaritmica

diff_log_usuarios_ts <- diff(log_usuarios_ts)

cat("\n Tasas de crecimiento (diff_log_usuarios_ts) \n")
tasas <- round(as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts) * 100, 1)
periodos <- c("2020-2021", "2021-2022", "2022-2023", "2023-2024")
for (i in 1:4) {
  icono <- ifelse(tasas[i] > 0, "sube", "baja")
  cat(sprintf("  %s:  %+.1f%%  %s\n", periodos[i], tasas[i], icono))
}
```

```{r}

dummy_diff_manual <- matrix(
  c(0, 0, 1, 1),              
  ncol = 1,
  dimnames = list(NULL, "recuperacion")
)

x_dummies_diff_log <- dummy_diff_manual

cat("\nx_dummies_diff_log (diferenciada):\n")
print(data.frame(periodo = periodos, recuperacion = dummy_diff_manual[,1]))
```

```{r}

plot(usuarios_ts,
     main = "Serie de Usuarios en niveles",   
     xlab = "Año",
     ylab = "Total de personas",
     col  = "#1565C0",
     lwd  = 2.5,
     type = "o",
     pch  = 16,
     cex  = 1.5,
     axes = FALSE,
     ylim = c(0, max(usuarios_ts) * 1.12))
axis(1, at = 2020:2024, labels = 2020:2024, cex.axis = 0.85)
axis(2, at = axTicks(2), labels = format(axTicks(2), big.mark = ","))
grid(col = "gray85", lty = "dotted")
text(2020:2024, as.numeric(usuarios_ts),
     format(round(usuarios_ts), big.mark = ","),
     pos = 3, cex = 0.72, col = "#0D47A1", font = 2)
abline(lm(as.numeric(usuarios_ts) ~ c(2020:2024)),
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)


plot(log_usuarios_ts,
     main = "Serie del Log_Usuarios",         
     xlab = "Año",
     ylab = "Usuarios",
     col  = "#6A1B9A",
     lwd  = 2.5,
     type = "o",
     pch  = 16,
     cex  = 1.5,
     axes = FALSE)
axis(1, at = 2020:2024, labels = 2020:2024, cex.axis = 0.85)
axis(2, cex.axis = 0.85)
box()
grid(col = "gray85", lty = "dotted")
text(2020:2024, as.numeric(log_usuarios_ts),
     round(log_usuarios_ts, 2),
     pos = 3, cex = 0.72, col = "#4A148C", font = 2)
abline(lm(as.numeric(log_usuarios_ts) ~ c(2020:2024)),
       col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)


plot(diff_log_usuarios_ts,
     main = "Serie del Diff_Log_Usuarios",    
     xlab = "Año",
     ylab = "% crecimiento",
     col  = "#1B5E20",
     lwd  = 2.5,
     type = "o",
     pch  = 16,
     cex  = 1.5,
     axes = FALSE,
     ylim = c(min(diff_log_usuarios_ts) - 0.05,
              max(diff_log_usuarios_ts) + 0.08))
axis(1, at = 2021:2024, labels = 2021:2024, cex.axis = 0.85)
axis(2, cex.axis = 0.85)
box()
grid(col = "gray85", lty = "dotted")
abline(h = 0, col = "red", lty = 2, lwd = 1.5)
text(2021:2024, as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts),
     paste0(ifelse(as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts) > 0, "+", ""),
            round(as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts) * 100, 1), "%"),
     pos = 3, cex = 0.80, col = "#1B5E20", font = 2)


```


```{r}
cat("\n MODELO ARIMAX(1,0,1) con dummy\n")
cat("Diferencia entre 2023 y 2024\n\n")

model <- arima(
  diff_log_usuarios_ts,           
  order = c(1, 0, 1),             
  xreg  = x_dummies_diff_log      
)

cat("Resultados:\n")
print(summary(model))

```

```{r}
cat("\nConclusion\n")

coefs     <- coef(model)
nombres   <- names(coefs)
sigma_val <- sqrt(model$sigma2)

cat("\nCoeficientes del modelo:\n")
for (i in seq_along(coefs)) {
  cat(sprintf("  %-20s = %+.4f\n", nombres[i], coefs[i]))
}

cat("\nResultados:\n")
cat("  ar1          → ¿cuánto influye el crecimiento del año pasado?\n")
cat("                 Negativo = baja\n")
cat("  ma1          → ¿cuánto corrige el error del año pasado?\n")
cat("  recuperacion → ¿cuánto más crecen los años futuros?\n")
cat("                 Positivo = 2023 y 2024 crecieron significativamente\n")
cat(sprintf("\n  Sigma (error promedio): %.4f  ≈  %.1f%% de error\n",
            sigma_val, sigma_val * 100))

cat("\nAIC del ARIMA:  ", round(AIC(model_arima), 2), "\n")
cat("AIC del ARIMAX: ", round(AIC(model), 2), "\n")
cat("El modelo con MENOR AIC es el mejor\n")
```


```{r}
# Hacemos una grafica de lo observado vs ajustado + residuales

ajustados <- as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts) - as.numeric(residuals(model))
plot(2021:2024, as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts),
     type = "o", pch = 16, cex = 1.8,
     col  = "#1565C0", lwd = 2.5,
     main = "Observado vs Ajustado por ARIMAX",
     xlab = "Año", ylab = "Tasa de crecimiento",
     ylim = range(c(as.numeric(diff_log_usuarios_ts), ajustados)) +
            c(-0.03, 0.05),
     axes = FALSE)
lines(2021:2024, ajustados, type = "o", pch = 17,
      col = "#C62828", lwd = 2.5, cex = 1.8, lty = 2)
axis(1, at = 2021:2024, labels = 2021:2024)
axis(2)
box(); grid(col = "gray88", lty = "dotted")
abline(h = 0, col = "gray60", lty = 3)
legend("topright",
       legend = c("Observado (real)", "Ajustado (modelo)"),
       col    = c("#1565C0", "#C62828"),
       lty    = c(1, 2), lwd = 2, pch = c(16, 17),
       bty    = "n", cex = 0.85)

plot(2021:2024, as.numeric(res),
     type = "h", lwd = 4,
     col  = ifelse(as.numeric(res) >= 0, "#1B5E20", "#B71C1C"),
     main = "Residuales del modelo\n(errores que cometió)",
     xlab = "Año", ylab = "Error",
     axes = FALSE,
     ylim = c(min(res) - 0.01, max(res) + 0.03))
points(2021:2024, as.numeric(res), pch = 16, cex = 1.8,
       col = ifelse(as.numeric(res) >= 0, "#1B5E20", "#B71C1C"))
abline(h = 0, col = "black", lwd = 1.5)
axis(1, at = 2021:2024, labels = 2021:2024)
axis(2)
box(); grid(col = "gray88", lty = "dotted")
text(2021:2024, as.numeric(res),
     round(as.numeric(res), 3),
     pos = ifelse(as.numeric(res) >= 0, 3, 1),
     cex = 0.85, font = 2,
     col = ifelse(as.numeric(res) >= 0, "#1B5E20", "#B71C1C"))
mtext("Verde = el modelo se quedó corto | Rojo = el modelo se pasó",
      side = 1, line = 4, cex = 0.65, col = "gray40")


```
